title: Senior Business Transformation Analyst
core_responsibilities: Execute project tasks independently including process mapping, data analysis, and solution design
Support implementation of Business Transformation methodologies and tools with internal and external partners
Contribute to development of project plans, functional specifications, and change management activities
Participate in knowledge-sharing and training projects to build team capabilities
Adhere to documentation, reporting, and stakeholder communication standards
recommended_emphasis: Highlight HSBC USD 8M digital transformation programme and PMO experience as direct evidence of transformation project delivery
Emphasise process improvement and data analysis work from Hapag-Lloyd and ECE Group to bridge to process mapping requirement
Showcase cross-functional coordination and stakeholder management with senior leadership (C-suite reporting at HSBC)
Stress multilingual capability (English C1, German B1+, Chinese C2) as strong bonus given international 30-country operations
Position JIRA/Confluence proficiency as evidence of project documentation and reporting tool experience
Address travel requirement willingness explicitly in cover letter given the 4 days/week expectation
